description: Manual-validation monthly subscription tracking for Jellyfin with playback enforcement on expiry, an admin page and an in-app user UI.
name: NoPayNoPlay
overview: Tracks a monthly subscription per Jellyfin user (default 10/month, configurable). Admins validate payments manually; playback is blocked when the subscription expires without deleting the account. Built-in i18n with English and French; the UI follows the Jellyfin UI culture.
